summary: Iteration 77: Complete pricing system, subscription plans, and referral testing - ALL PASSED. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 pricing tabs, referral system, Panel Vecinal paywall, Dashboard Barrio, and header navigation working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 verified complete pricing system: 1) Pricing page /plans with 5 tabs working (Alarmas Hogar, Alarmas Negocio, Sentinel SOS, Escudo Vecinal, Extras), 2) All prices verified: Essential 33.90, Premium 44.90, Comercio 54.90, Empresa 74.90, Sentinel Basic 9.99/Plus 14.99/Pro 24.99, Vecinal 299.99/year, 3) 12 extra components with individual prices, 4) Referral system '1 mes GRATIS' working across all products, 5) Panel Vecinal referral validation showing 'Codigo no valido' for invalid codes, 6) Comparison table ManoProtect vs Securitas Direct vs Prosegur, 7) All header navigation working
